title: Herobrine SMP GUI
description: Herobrine SMP is one of the famous Minecraft SMP. This GUI brings all the members of Herobrine SMP in your inventory.
body:
# 🗡️ Herobrine SMP GUI

Bring the energy of one of India’s most iconic Minecraft SMPs straight into your game. This custom inventory GUI is inspired by the Herobrine SMP, featuring a vibrant background and a lineup of recognizable player-style characters that capture the spirit of the series.

## ✨ Features

-  SMP-Inspired Design – A visually rich background themed around adventure and survival.
-  Player Lineup Showcase – Stylized Minecraft characters representing the Herobrine SMP vibe.
-  Clean Inventory Layout – Maintains Minecraft’s default usability while enhancing visuals.
-  High-Quality Textures – Carefully designed to feel immersive without being distracting.
-  Lightweight – No performance impact, purely visual enhancement.

## 📦 Compatibility

-  Designed for modern Minecraft versions.
-  Works with most resource packs (may override inventory textures).

## NOTE

This only change the survival inventory in game. Not all gui...
